_comment: Defines the Gemini output schema and allowed action list for Workflow B. Schema Validator Code node checks against this before any API call.

geminiOutputSchema.action: string — one of the values in allowedActions below
geminiOutputSchema.method: string — GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
geminiOutputSchema.payload: object | null — body for POST/PUT/PATCH, null for GET/DELETE
geminiOutputSchema.isDestructive: boolean — true requires Telegram confirmation before execution
geminiOutputSchema.confirmationMessage: string — human-readable summary shown in Telegram confirm dialog
geminiOutputSchema.humanReadableSummary: string — shown in Telegram after successful execution

validationRules.prices: Must be a positive number, not below room floor, not above room ceiling
validationRules.roomIds: Must be a string matching a known Beds24 room ID
